newsSince: No material new company-specific news since June 9. The data-center cooling story (Stellar Energy and LiquidStack acquisitions, raised FY26 adjusted EPS guidance to $14.75-$14.95, record ~$10.7B backlog) was disclosed at Q1 earnings before the window. Nothing fresh on bottleneck capacity or orders since June 9.

sources.label: TT Q1 2026 earnings call summary (Yahoo Finance)
Morningstar: Trane earnings, data-center-led HVAC demand

verdicts.rankRationale: No new bottleneck or earnings signal since June 9; DC-cooling thesis (Stellar/LiquidStack, $10.7B backlog) already in the price and fully disseminated. Mega-cap power/cooling exposure stays a top-tier under-owned-bottleneck name, but residual alpha is fully recognized. Hold rank 7.
verdicts.bull: Liquid-cooling (LiquidStack) plus modular chiller plants (Stellar, $350M to $1B path) give scarce DC thermal bottleneck exposure with record backlog.
verdicts.neutral: Strong execution but story is consensus; $109B cap and +20% YTD leave limited residual alpha.
verdicts.bear: Fully disseminated DC-cooling narrative; valuation re-rated, any HVAC cycle softness pressures the multiple.
